title: Unit tests for rate limiter check_rate_limit
description: Why: logic must be verified independently. What: unit tests in relay/src/ws.rs or state.rs test module. External oracle: the spec (limit N = 120; window = 60s). Test cases: (1) under_limit_passes: 119 calls with limit=120 on same pub_id, all return true; (2) at_limit_passes: 120th call returns true; (3) over_limit_rejected: 121st call returns false; (4) window_reset_unblocks: after 121 calls (all rejected), advance time past 60s by calling with a future Instant; first call after reset returns true. Note: Instant cannot be mocked easily — use a smaller test limit (e.g., limit=3) and test the count logic directly by checking the DashMap entry. OR expose the window as a Duration parameter for testability. Designer choice: add a test-only fn check_rate_limit_with_window(limit, window_secs) that accepts a configurable window.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-relay rate_limit passes; all 4 test cases pass
close_reason: 5 rate limiter unit tests pass; window reset verified via direct map manipulation
